name: resonance
description: Specialized AI bots for code generation with minimal token usage

commands.title: Resonance: Generate Tests for Current File

resonance.apiKey.description: Anthropic API key (or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var)

resonance.pythonPath.description: Python executable with resonance installed (default: python, or py -3 on Windows if python is missing)

resonance.showTokenStats.description: Show token usage after each generation
